pan-filled-squid-teleculinaria.name: Pan Filled Squid
instructions: Fix and wash the squid, remove their tentacles and pinch them. Then season the squid bags with lemon juice, salt and pepper. Take the rice to boil in salted water, then pass it by cold water and reserve it.

Peel and wash the onions and teeth finely. Pinch the bacon, too. In a pot on fire, heat the 2 tablespoons of olive oil, then add half the onion, half the garlic and bacon and let it saute well until it gets golden. Add the tentacles of the squid, let cook for another 3 minutes, remove from the fire, add the cooked rice and chopped parsley and wrap it very well. Fill the squid with this prepared and stick it in.

Take a pot to the fire with 0.5 dl of olive oil, let it warm up, add the rest of the garlic and onion and let it saute until the onion becomes transparent. Then add the naked tomato with the sauce and the laurel leaf and let it cook, in mild heat, until it becomes soft. Remove from the fire, reject the laurel, reduce the puree, correct the seasonings, add the squid, take it back to the soft heat and let it cook until the squid is soft. Remove from the fire and serve decorated to taste and accompanied with mashed potatoes.

pan-sultani-peas-recipe-lezzet.name: Pan Sultani Peas Recipe
instructions: 1. Pope the Sultan's peas in short sweaty water.
2. Pay attention to the extra cooking; about 2–3 minutes to cook, texture protection is enough.
3. Mix fine chopped onion, corn flour and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Make sure the materials are thoroughly blended.
5. Take some liquid oil to the pan and heat it.
6. Add the prepared mixture to the pan.
7. In the middle fire, cook the mixture's interior until well the prilipescent area, supper string.
8. To use fires care show; in-house.
9. Bake for about 10 minutes, intermediate reverse frerelate each two sides to get gold color.
10. Take from the stove after the prying.
11. 11. You can serve with yogurt on the side.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

paneer-curry-with-peas.name: Paneer Curry With Peas

ingredients.item: Paneer or firm or extra-firm tofu
-ounce can crushed tomatoes with added purée
Shelled fresh peas (from about 1 1/2 pounds peas in pods) or 1 1/2 cups frozen peas

ingredients.prep: a fresh cow’s milk or buffalo’s-milk cheese, and usli ghee (clarified butter; also called ghee) are sold at some natural foods stores and at Indian markets. If you can’t find paneer, then tofu, chicken, shrimp, or scallops would also work well in this recipe. Clarified butter or vegetable oil can be used in place of the ghee.

ingredients.item: Garam masala is a curry spice blend that’s available in the spice section of many supermarkets
ingredients.prep: at Indian markets, and from thespicehouse.com.

instructions: Place flour in medium bowl. Add paneer to bowl; toss to coat with flour. Heat 2 tablespoons ghee in heavy large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Shake excess flour from paneer; add to skillet and cook until browned in spots, turning occasionally, about 4 minutes. Transfer paneer to plate; set aside. Reserve skillet.

Place onion pieces in processor. Using on/off turns, process until finely chopped but not watery. Heat remaining 3 tablespoons ghee in reserved skillet over medium heat. Add cumin seeds and stir until aromatic, about 1 minute. Add chopped onion and cook until beginning to brown, stirring often, about 10 minutes. Add minced ginger, minced garlic, ground coriander, and minced serrano chile with seeds; stir 1 minute. Add crushed tomatoes with puree, 1/2 cup water, and turmeric; bring to simmer. Reduce heat to medium low; cover and simmer until mixture thickens slightly and flavors blend, stirring occasionally, about 15 minutes.

Add shelled fresh peas and cooked paneer; gently fold to incorporate evenly. Cook mixture over medium-low heat until peas are tender and paneer is heated through, folding occasionally, about 5 minutes. Fold in garam masala and cilantro. Season curry to taste with salt and pepper. Serve with steamed basmati rice.

panzanella.name: Panzanella

ingredients.item: Extra-virgin olive oil plus more for drizzling
Fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: Pullman, or ciabatta), cut into 1'-thick slices
such as Fresno or red jalapeño; optional
soaked, rinsed, patted dry, finely chopped (optional)

instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Using the tip of a paring knife, make two 1" cuts on the bottom of each tomato, forming an X. Add tomatoes to water and cook just until skin begins to peel back at each X, 30–40 seconds. Using a slotted spoon, transfer tomatoes to a large bowl of ice water; let cool. Peel and core tomatoes; place in another large bowl. (Alternatively, use a vegetable peeler with a serrated blade to peel tomatoes.) Using your hands, crush tomatoes, breaking up any large pieces and releasing juices.
Stir in 1/2 cup oil, 3 Tbsp. vinegar, and garlic. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and more vinegar, if desired.
Add bread to tomato mixture in bowl. Toss until bread is well coated and starts to absorb liquid. Let sit for 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, char bell peppers and chiles, if using, directly over a gas flame or in the broiler until blackened all over. Transfer to a resealable plastic bag. Close bag and let sit for 15 minutes. Remove peppers and chiles; peel, core, seed, and cut into 1/4" strips.

Add peppers, chiles, olives, capers, and anchovies, if using, to bread mixture. Massage with your hands until all ingredients are thoroughly combined and bread is broken down (it will break down differently depending on what kind is used; ciabatta tends to stay more intact than Pullman bread). Add basil and season with salt and pepper.
Cover salad and let stand at room temperature for 1 hour. Drizzle with oil just before serving.

paprika-shrimp-with-buttery-v8-sauce.name: Paprika Shrimp With Buttery V8 Sauce

ingredients.prep: peeled, deveined, preferably tails left on

ingredients.item: Mild red pepper flakes (such as maras
ingredients.prep: Urfa, or Aleppo-style), plus more for serving

instructions: Combine 3 Tbsp. oil and garlic in a large skillet. Set over medium heat and cook, tossing occasionally, until garlic has softened but has not taken on any color, 2–3 minutes.
Add shrimp, paprika, and red pepper flakes, and increase heat to medium-high. Season lightly with salt and cook, tossing often, until shrimp is almost cooked through, about 2 minutes.
Add V8 Original 100% Vegetable Juice and butter and cook, still tossing, until reduced by half and you have a silky red sauce, about 2 minutes.
Remove skillet from heat. Finely grate zest from lemon half over shrimp, then squeeze in about 1 tbsp. lemon juice. Scatter parsley and toss once more.
Transfer shrimp to a platter and drizzle with plenty of oil.
Serve with thick slices of crusty bread.

parathas.name: Parathas
instructions: Mix all-purpose flour and whole wheat flour in a bowl. Sprinkle salt on top. Add butter, sugar, garlic powder, and dried herbs. Mix together with your fingers. Pour water in gradually; continue to mix by hand until a soft dough is formed.
Knead dough until smooth and elastic, about 7 minutes. Cover with a damp cloth; let rest for 30 minutes.
Divide dough into 8 equal portions. Shape into smooth balls; lightly flatten. Dust with flour and roll into thin circles about 1/16-inch thick and 7 inches in diameter.
Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Fry each dough circle until golden, about 2 minutes per side. Drain on paper towels.

parmesan-brussels-sprouts-recipe-lezzet.name: Parmesan Brussels Sprouts Recipe

ingredients.item: 50 gr gr gr gr grated parmesan cheese Home
Instead of parmesan grana padano or pecorino novelo can be used.
Vegan version for herbal grated cheese or nutritious porcelain.
Brussels cabbage instead of of small brocoli flowers or palatial cabbage + carrotcan use mixture.
A lighter taste for cabbage euvine water 1–2 minutes can be cooked, then cooked in the oven or pan.
Olive oil can be used instead of butter or plain oil + olive oil mixture.
Garlic can be preferred to crush garlic powder or roasted garlic instead.
A small amount of bitter red pepper or chili flakes can be used instead of chili pepper.
Instead of lemon juice, delicate sour can add a mild sour aroma.
You can add extra fregranate and aroma by spreading olive trees.
Fresh herbs (maydanoz, thyme or fesle) enhances the color and freshness of the dish.

instructions: 1. Clean and eliminate the external leaves of cabbage.
2. In the oven: 200°C’ye heated oven tray with olive oil mixed cabbage index, salt and pepper sprinkle.
3. Oven up to 20 minutes, stir in half.
4. Heat the olive oil in a large pan, add the yellowish, and add light-and-gray;e roast.
5. Add Cabbages and paste 10–15 minutes in medium fire, intermediate stirring.
6. Bake cabbage u parmesan serpin and a few wait for a drink melt of cheese in the oven or pan for minutes.
7. Serve hot.
8. If you want u you can taste a few add drop lemon juice or pepper.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

passion-fruit-and-mint-sorbet-refreshing.name: Passion Fruit And Mint Sorbet: Refreshing And Tropical Recipe
passion-fruit-and-mint-sorbet-refreshing.original_name: Sorbete de maracuyá y menta: receta refrescante y tropical

ingredients.item: 300 ml fresh or frozen seawater pulp
80 g of sugar or natural sweetener ((adjusted as intended))
12  unidades de hojas de menta fresca
1 cdita de miel o sirope de agave

instructions: It puts water with sugar into a pot and heats low heat until completely dissolved and forms a light syrup. That's bad. Withdraw from the fire and let cool.

Processes the tidal pulp with lemon juice, fresh mint and honey in an average power blender. If you wish for a more dubious tit, don't put up with them and if you prefer a more fine texture, put them up to remove the seeds.
Mix the cold syrup with the production of a maracuja and test the level of sweetness. Do as you wish a little more sweet or more acid.
Take the mixture to a shallow metal container and freeze for 2 hours.
Remove from the freezer and scrape with a fork to break the crystals. Refreeze an hour and scrape again to achieve a light and airy Sorbet.
It serves with cold cups, adds mint leaves and a touch of lemon fringes.

pasta-with-no-cook-tomato-sauce.name: Pasta With No-cook Tomato Sauce

ingredients.prep: any shape (larger than cherry), preferably slightly overripe so they feel like full water balloons

instructions:
Cut 1½ lb. tomatoes in half through the equator (in other words, not through the core, but across the midline). Hold halves in your palms and gently squeeze over a bowl to squeeze out seeds and surrounding juice/jelly.
→  How to get the seeds out of tomatoes
Casually and imperfectly chop seeded tomatoes so you have some pieces that are very small and some pieces that are a bit larger, but everything should be smaller than an acorn.
Transfer tomatoes to a large bowl and mash mixture several times with the back of a large spoon or potato masher to release more juices (you can also just use your hands).

Finely grate 1 garlic clove into bowl with tomatoes with a microplane or fine grater, then add 2 Tbsp. butter, 4 tsp. vinegar, ½ tsp. red pepper, ¼ cup oil, and half of Parmesan. Season with several pinches of salt, then toss with a large spoon to combine.
Cover bowl with plastic and let sit at room temperature at least 30 minutes and up to 5 hours. This lets the flavors marry and tomato juices exude (because we want a saucy pasta).
Bring a large pot of water to a boil (4–6 qt.) and add a small fistful of salt. Cook 12 oz. pasta until al dente (follow package instructions).
As soon as pasta is ready, use tongs to transfer noodles to bowl with tomatoes and TOSS TOSS TOSS. You want the hot pasta to melt the cheese and butter, which will thicken the sauce.
Taste pasta and season with more salt, if needed, then toss in 1 cup basil.
Using tongs, portion pasta into shallow bowls, then spoon remaining tomatoes and juices over.
Top with remaining 2 oz. Parmesan, then drizzle with oil.

pasta-with-rock-shrimp-chile-and-lemon.name: Pasta With Rock Shrimp, Chile, And Lemon

ingredients.item: Red chile (such as holland or fresno)
Rock shrimp or other small shrimp
ingredients.prep: peeled and deveined, cut into small pieces

ingredients.item: A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat, then add bonito flakes; swirl butter to combine. Remove from heat and let sit 10 minutes to infuse.
Strain butter through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl, pressing on solids; discard bonito flakes. Cover and chill butter until ready to use.
Do Ahead: Bonito butter can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.
Finely grind dried shrimp in spice mill or with mortar and pestle; set aside for serving.

Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente, about 3 minutes if using fresh pasta, longer if dried. Drain pasta, reserving 1 ½ cups pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large skillet over medium. Add chile and lemon zest and cook, stirring, 20 seconds. Add rock shrimp and cook, tossing, 1 minute. Add tarragon, lemon juice, pasta, ¾ cup pasta cooking liquid, and 3 Tbsp. bonito butter and toss to coat. Cook, tossing and adding more pasta cooking liquid as needed, until sauce is glossy and coats pasta and shrimp are cooked through, about 3 minutes. Season with salt if needed.
Divide pasta among bowls and top with scallions and reserved dried shrimp.

pastry-in-cake-mold-lezzet.name: Pastry In Cake Mold
instructions: 1. For inside tribute, get a rough dough Crush and mix olive oil with liquid oil.
2.  Each the dough into the kneading container.
3. Add and blend dry yeast.
4. A&ccedil like the pool.
5. Juice, warm milk, add liquid oil, sugar and eggs and start kneading.
6. Continue kneading until you get an elastic dough.
7. Close the dough u and hold 30 minutes in a warm environment.
8. Take 6 equal cloths in Hamur mayalaninca and sprinkle the covered of every beze and eat plate size.
9. Pure powder sugar sprinkler from salty mixture.
10. Veuuml;stüste other dough in the way.
11. 11. 11. 11. Round oven tray size and roll pulp.
12. Create a big ring by two ends.
12. August Place the middle size, lubricated, middle hole cake mold.
14 July May 20 minutes more.
15. Öpreheated 180 degree bake 40 minutes in oven.
16. No matter.

peach-and-tomato-caprese-salad.name: Peach And Tomato Caprese Salad

ingredients.prep: pitted, and sliced into half moons

instructions: Whisk together olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and 1 pinch flaked salt in a small bowl until dressing is smooth.
Alternate tomato slices, peach slices, mozzarella slices, and basil leaves in layers on a serving platter. Drizzle dressing over salad and sprinkle remaining flaked salt on top.

peach-and-mango-spritzer.name: Peach-and-mango Spritzer
instructions: Pour sparkling water and syrup in a tall glass filled with ice.
Stir briefly to combine.

peach-honey-vanilla-butter.name: Peach-honey-vanilla Butter
instructions: Combine peaches, apple, and orange juice in a large, heavy pot; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer until peaches are tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Cool slightly, about 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, inspect 8 to 10 pint-sized jars for cracks and rings for rust, discarding any defective ones. Immerse in simmering water until peach mixture is ready. Wash new, unused lids and rings in warm soapy water.
Pureé peach mixture, working in batches, in a blender or food processor until smooth and yields about 14 cups. Return peach purée to the same large pot.

Stir sugar, honey, and vanilla bean seeds into peach pureé; bring to a boil, stirring until sugar dissolves. Reduce heat to low, and simmer, stirring frequently, until mixture is thick and starts to mound, 60 to 70 minutes.

Pack peach-honey butter into hot, sterilized jars, filling to within ¼ inch of tops. Run a clean knife or thin spatula around insides of jars to remove any air bubbles. Wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any residue. Top with lids and screw rings on tightly.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower jars 2 inches apart into the boiling water using a holder. Pour in more boiling water to cover jars by at least 1 inch. Bring to a rolling boil, cover, and process for 5 minutes.

Remove the jars from the stockpot and let rest, several inches apart, for 12 to 24 hours. Press the center of each lid with a finger to ensure the lid does not move up or down. Remove the rings for storage and store in a cool, dark area.

peachcherry-lambic-charlotte.name: Peach–cherry Lambic Charlotte
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Bring cherries, lambic, and 1 tablespoon honey to a boil in a small saucepan; reduce heat and simmer until syrupy, 12–15 minutes. Let cool.

Meanwhile, butter ramekins and sprinkle with sugar. Butter 1 side of bread slices with remaining 1/4 cup butter; cut into 2x1-inch strips. Line bottom and sides of ramekins with bread strips, buttered side against ramekins, cutting to fit and filling in gaps with scraps.

Toss peaches, cornstarch, lemon zest, lemon juice, salt, and remaining 2 tablespoons sugar and 1 tablespoon honey in a medium bowl. Fold in cherry mixture. Divide fruit mixture among ramekins, pressing in gently. Cover with remaining bread, buttered side up, cutting to fit and filling in gaps with scraps. Sprinkle lightly with sugar.
Place ramekins on a rimmed baking sheet and bake until juices are bubbling and bread is golden brown, 30–40 minutes. Let cool 10 minutes. Turn out charlottes and serve with whipped cream.

peanut-butter-cookies.name: Peanut Butter Cookies

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton’s kosher salt
Demerara or raw sugar and flaky sea salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast ½ cup (71 g) roasted, salted peanuts on a rimmed baking sheet until browned and fragrant, 6–8 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop.

Meanwhile, cook 6 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a medium skillet over medium heat, swirling pan often, until butter foams, then browns, 4–6 minutes. Transfer brown butter with solids to a medium bowl; chill, stirring every 5 minutes, until cooled and beginning to solidify, about 15 minutes.

Whisk ¾ cup (93 g) all-purpose flour, ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. baking powder, and ¼ tsp. baking soda in another medium bowl. Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat 1 large egg plus 1 large egg yolk, ¾ cup (150 g) granulated sugar, ½ cup (170 g; packed) light brown sugar, and ¼ cup water in a large bowl until mixture is light and falls back on itself in a slowly dissolving ribbon, about 2 minutes.

Reduce mixer speed to low and gradually add in dry ingredients, then increase speed to high and beat 1 minute to develop gluten and hydrate flour. Add peanut butter, chopped peanuts, and brown butter and mix on low speed, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, until fully incorporated, about 30 seconds. Let dough rest at room temperature until slightly firmed up, about 10 minutes.

Portion dough into 20 balls (about 2 heaping Tbsp. each) and transfer to 2 parchment paper-lined rimmed baking sheets. Dip the tines of a fork in cold water and flatten cookie dough balls to ½" thick, making a crosshatch pattern on the top of each. Chill, covered, 1 hour.
Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; place a dry, medium skillet on the bottom rack, then increase oven temperature to 375°.

Sprinkle cookies with demerara or raw sugar and flaky sea salt. Working quickly, transfer 1 sheet of cookies to upper rack, then carefully pour 1 cup water into hot skillet; water will bubble and sizzle violently. Bake cookies until browned and edges are crisp, 12–15 minutes. Let cool slightly on baking sheet, then transfer to a wire rack and cool completely. Repeat with second sheet.
Do ahead: Cookie dough can be shaped and frozen 1 month ahead. Freeze in an airtight container. Let rest at room temperature 1 hour before baking. 

Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in our March 2016 issue as part of BA’s Best, a collection of our essential recipes. Head this way for more of our best cookie recipes →

peppy-brownie-lezzet.name: Peppy Brownie

ingredients.item: 2.5 cups of coconut (can be horse flour or nuts flour)

instructions: 1. Crush Bananas with the help of a fork.
2. Bananas are very desirable, but can use 2 mins of honey or palm extract or not.
3. Then add other materials and mix up to a homogeneous consistency, and add &ccedil.
4. Mini transfer a boron and cook with 25-30 minutes in the refrigerator before heated to 170 degrees.
5. Service.

pickled-capia-pepper-recipe-lezzet.name: Pickled Capia Pepper Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tbsp one of the black pepper (optional)
1 tbsp of mustal seeds or dill (optional, for aroma)
Instead of tap water, you can get a cleaner and light taste using chilled water or mineral water.
You can use sea salt or rock salt instead of regular pickled salt; it is different from aroma and hungry health
Instead of sugar, you can prepare a lighter sweet pickled by adding honey or map.
Ceramic or porcelain jar can also be used instead of glass jar; pickled aroma is protected.
Peppers all in place of dropping strip or banding prepare the picker faster and make the decorative presentation.

instructions: 1. If it is necessary to wash the peppers and cut the stems and eliminate the two divided.
2. Süzün, throw the peppers into boiling water and strain; this ensures that the shells of peppers are slightly softened.
3. Clean and dry glass or ceramic pickled jars.
4. Peel the garlic and place the whole or iri slices between peppers.
5. Place the jar's inner peppers, sprinkle the intermediates of peppers and dereotu/ mustal seeds.
6. Prepare salty-cyclist mixture by mixing vinegar, water, salt and sugar in a separate container.
7. The mixture of the jar into pour peppers should stay in the interior of the liquid completely.
8. Close the cover of the jar slip and take it to the refrigerator after waiting for 2–3 km.

pineapple-dessert-lezzet.name: Pineapple Dessert
instructions: 1. Take the brunette powder sugar into a mixing container.
2. Find the pineapples that you slice round into brunette powder sugar and fry in a nonstick surface pan.
3. For the food, take the cream into a mixing container and rub it with the help of a mixer until it is lightly rough.
4. Add Lor cheese, milk and grated lime bark and mix all the material until thoroughly miss.
5. Take the pineapples you're angry in a serving plate.
6. Add to your stores.
7. Serve by decorating with mint leaves.

pink-smoothie-bowl.name: Pink Smoothie Bowl
instructions: Pour almond milk in a blender along with oats and greek yogurt. Add fruit and blend well, adding a little more almond milk if needed.
Place in a bowl and add desired toppings.
Serve.

pistachio-hong-kong-style-french-toast.name: Pistachio Hong Kong-style French Toast
instructions: Add the 2 cups of oil to a medium pot and heat until it reaches 350ºF
Cut the crusts off the bread and smear 1 tablespoon pistachio cream on two of the slices. Layer the bread together to make sure that the pistachio cream is sandwiched inside.
In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, and vanilla.
Dip the pistachio sandwich in the egg mixture, fully coating, and fry the sandwich until golden brown, about 30 seconds per side.
Serve immediately, and garnish with condensed milk, butter, pistachio cream, and crushed pistachios.
Enjoy!

pistachio-melissa-cookies-lezzet.name: Pistachio Melissa Cookies
instructions: 1. Margarine, powder sugar, eggs, flour, baking powder, powder peanut and vanilla dough kneading container, and knead the materials for 7 minutes until the extract.
2. Cut the dough into pieces of walnut size.
3. Round shape verip index to oven tray.
4. Cook in the oven for 180 degrees before resting for 10 minutes.
5. Serve your service.

pistachio-thumbprint-cookies.name: Pistachio Thumbprint Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Place pistachios in a small bowl. Unwrap dough and slice crosswise into 18 pieces and roll each between the palms of your hands into smooth balls. Press gently into pistachios to coat half of each ball, then place, pistachio side up, on a parchment-lined baking sheet, spacing about 2" apart.

Bake cookies until barely golden, 8–10 minutes. Remove from oven and press the handle of a wooden spoon about three-quarters of the way down into the center of each cookie to make a round indentation, and wiggle in a circular motion to widen. Return to oven; bake until golden brown, 5–8 minutes. Let cool on baking sheet.

Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat pistachio paste and butter in a small bowl until light and fluffy, about 30 seconds. Dollop 1–2 tsp. pistachio mixture into the indentation in each cookie.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be baked (but not filled) 3 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature. Cookies can be filled 1 day ahead.

pizza-dough.name: Pizza Dough
instructions: Whisk yeast, sugar, and 1¼ cups warm (not hot) water in a small bowl. Let stand in a warm place until yeast is foamy, about 10 minutes.

Mix salt and 3½ cups 00 flour in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook. With the mixer on low speed, mix in yeast mixture and ¼ cup oil. Continue to mix, gradually increasing speed to medium-high, until dough is smooth and elastic.

Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface and give it a few turns by hand to finish kneading it; it will still be slightly sticky. Transfer dough to a large oiled bowl; turn to coat, cover with a kitchen towel or plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, 1–1½ hours.

Punch down dough to deflate and turn out onto a well-floured work surface. Divide into 8 pieces (about 4 oz. each); shape each into a ball. Cover with a kitchen towel and let stand 15 minutes before stretching dough. Or, transfer balls to a floured rimmed baking sheet and chill until cold.

Dust a large work surface with a mixture of 00 flour and semolina flour. If dough has been chilled, transfer a ball to work surface and let stand until still cool but not cold (it should register about 60° on an instant-read thermometer).

Working one at a time, press and stretch dough balls into 9”–10” rounds, sprinkling with more 00 and semolina flour as needed to keep dough from sticking (use as little as you can). Using one hand as a guide, shape a slightly thicker rim around edge. If dough resists or shrinks back as you shape it, let it rest before proceeding; do not overwork dough. (Alternatively, you can roll dough out with a rolling pin.)

Heat a 10”–12” cast-iron skillet over medium heat until very hot, about 5 minutes. Working one at a time, carefully transfer dough to skillet and cook, flipping once and rotating crust to encourage even cooking, until barely tan and browned in a few spots, about 5 minutes total. Press any thicker parts against the pan to help cook through. Transfer crusts to wire racks or baking sheets as you work, brushing off any excess flour. Let cool.
Do ahead: Parbaked crusts can be refrigerated overnight or frozen, well wrapped, up to 2 weeks.

plain-batter-argiro.name: Plain Batter
instructions: Add the flour to a bowl.
Add the salt, sugar and mix all the solid ingredients with a wire.
Add the sparkling water, ouzo and mix with wire to make the flour smooth and disappear.
Let it freeze in the refrigerator.
Also when the porridge and hot oil are cold in the pan, it does not suck oil and remains critical.
The material you fry should be dry and floured first in a little flour.
You shake off the excess flour and dip it in the frozen turmeric.
Fry in hot oil for a few minutes until golden.
Always have to dry the material on absorbent paper to remove the excess oil.
So it won't soften after frying and remain crispy.
The remaining turmeric can be flavored with herbs or chopped vegetables and fried spoonfuls of spoonfuls in hot oil.

plastered-pork-tacos-with-apple-jalapeno.name: plastered' Pork Tacos With Apple-jalapeño Salsa

ingredients.item: Seeded and finely diced jalapeno pepper

ingredients.prep: cut into wedges, or as needed

instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C) with oven rack in center position.
Season all sides of pork with rosemary and black pepper.
Stir flour, water, ½ cup salt, and egg white together in a large bowl until very smooth. Add flour if 'plaster' is too runny. Add pork shoulder; coat thoroughly.
Spread a few spoonfuls of excess 'plaster' into a baking pan or dish. Add pork shoulder, fat-side up. Re-apply 'plaster' with a spoon to any spots not covered and to the top.
Roast in the center of the preheated oven until surface is dry and hard and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center reads 85°C (85 degrees C), about 3 ½ hours.

Cool 15 to 60 minutes. Remove and discard 'plaster.' Break pork into big chunks; transfer to a plate. Add some accumulated pan juices from bottom of the pan. Cover with plastic wrap. Chill in the refrigerator, 8 hours to overnight.
Combine apple, onion, jalapeño, cilantro, juice of 2 limes, 1 teaspoon salt, and cayenne pepper in a bowl; set salsa aside.
Slice chilled pork into strips, then cut into ½-inch cubes.
Heat a dry, nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork; brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Serve pork on warm tortillas with salsa and lime wedges.

poached-chicken.name: Poached Chicken

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 0.75 teaspoons morton kosher salt

instructions: Bring chicken, carrots, garlic, salt, ⅓ cup dill, and 5 cups water to a bare simmer in a medium pot over medium heat. (It will take some time for the liquid to come to a simmer...be patient. If you rush it, the chicken will be tough.) Once liquid begins to simmer, reduce heat to low and cook until juices run clear when thickest part of chicken is pierced, 10–12 minutes.

Meanwhile, coarsely chop remaining ⅓ cup dill. Remove pan from heat and stir in lemon juice; pick out and discard dill. Transfer chicken and garlic to a cutting board and let cool slightly. Smash garlic using the side of a chef’s knife and stir back into poaching liquid. Cut chicken crosswise into thin slices.

Divide chicken among bowls. Pour some of the poaching liquid over chicken, then top with chopped dill, pepper, and a drizzle of oil.
Do Ahead: Chicken can be poached 2 days ahead. Let chicken and broth cool separately. Wrap chicken and transfer broth to an airtight container; chill.

pomegranate-aperitif.name: Pomegranate Aperitif
instructions: Whisk pomegranate juice and saba in a large pitcher, then stir in Lillet and bitters. Pour into rocks glasses filled with ice; top off with club soda.

popcorn-with-nutritional-yeast-and-alepp.name: Popcorn With Nutritional Yeast And Aleppo Pepper

ingredients.item: Aleppo pepper or crushed red pepper flakes
A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Finely grind nutritional yeast, Aleppo pepper, and salt in spice mill or with mortar and pestle.
Arrange popcorn on a rimmed baking sheet and drizzle with oil; toss to coat.
Sprinkle with some of the nutritional yeast mixture and toss well to coat, adding more nutritional yeast mixture to taste.

poppy-seed-pita-lezzet.name: Poppy Seed Pita
instructions: 1. Breads are created from dough.
2.  It is taken from the spine to a beze and opens with the hands of about 1 cm thickness.
3. The dough is crushed and lubricated.
4. The dough is put again on it.
5. This process continues 4 times.
6. Andnbsp; When the last floor is laid, again the mortar is put on, the holes with cutlery are opened.
7.  It is given rectangle shape by pulling the dough held from two ends with the hand.
8.  220 degree is cooked in pre-heated oven.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

porcini-rubbed-beef-rib-roast.name: Porcini-rubbed Beef Rib Roast

ingredients.item: Flaky sea salt and horseradish-yogurt sauce

instructions: Pulse mushrooms, kosher salt, peppercorns, and marjoram in a spice mill or mini food processor until coarsely ground. Pat meat dry, then rub mushroom mixture all over. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet. Let sit at room temperature 1 hour (for even more flavor, chill, uncovered, overnight, then let sit at room temperature 1 hour before roasting).

Preheat oven to 107°C. Roast meat until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center registers 49°C (for medium-rare), about 4 hours. Tent with foil and let sit at room temperature at least 30 minutes and up to 1 hour.

Increase oven temperature to 260°C. Remove foil and roast meat until browned and crisp, 5–10 minutes. Immediately transfer to a cutting board. Cut off ribs in 1 piece, then slice into individual ribs. Carve roast into 1/2" slices and arrange on a serving platter along with ribs. Season with sea salt and serve with Horseradish-Yogurt Sauce, if desired.
Rub can be made 1 day ahead; store in an airtight container at room temperature.

pork-chops-with-aged-tsipouro-argiro.name: Pork Chops With Aged Tsipouro
instructions: Pork chops with aged raki are a very delicious recipe!
For pork chops, start sautéing the boats in an unsticking pan with some olive oil.
Salt and pepper, add the oregano and put out with an aged tsipouro.
Remove from heat and leave pork chops aside.
In a saucer, sauté the apples with some butter, add brown sugar to caramelize the apples and add the vintage.
In a bowl add the broth with water, the mustard mix and pour the apples, add the pulped onion and let them cook.
In the end, add the steaks, prosciutto, lemon and fresh thyme.
We thank Tasoula Koufopoulou from the restaurant Apartiro in Karditsa for granting the recipe.

pork-leg-with-honey-mustard-argiro.name: Pork Leg With Honey, Mustard

ingredients.item: 1 boot pork whole with skin about 3 kg
1 boot pork whole with skin about 3 kg

instructions: Remove the thigh from the refrigerator and let it come to room temperature for at least 1 hour.
Put it in a baking pan and carve with a sharp knife on the surface of the fat in rubies.
Add the orange and lemon.
Add salt and pepper and spread the thigh.
Add the rosemary and orange cups to the baking pan.
Cover the pork thigh with parchment paper and foil. Put it in the oven.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 200oC, in the resistors, on the bottom grill, for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
After one and a half hours of baking, reveal the thigh and add the potatoes, garlic and peel and all the liquids left in the bowl.
Mix honey with balsamic vinegar and mustard.
Brush the thigh with a brush, lower the oven to 170oC and continue baking for 1 hour and 30 minutes until the skin is dry and the potatoes are melted.

portobello-frites.name: Portobello Frites
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 204°C. Puncture each potato with a fork three times, sprinkle each with 1/2 teaspoon of the coarse sea salt, and wrap individually in foil. Bake until tender to the touch, about 40 minutes. Unwrap the potatoes and let cool; when cool enough to handle, cut each into eight wedges. Set aside.
2. While the potatoes are cooling, whisk together the olive oil, 1 teaspoon of the salt, the garlic, pepper, and shallots in a small bowl.

3. Place the portobello caps on a sheet pan with rimmed edges and coat them evenly on both sides with the olive oil mixture, leaving them rounded sides up. Roast until soft in the middle, 8 to 12 minutes.

4. Transfer the portobello caps to a plate, still rounded sides up, and set aside to cool. Pour the wine, vegetable stock, and mustard onto the warm sheet pan to mix with the mushroom cooking juices. Scrape any solids off the tray, then carefully pour this mixture into a large saucepan. Heat the mixture over medium heat until reduced by half, 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Stir the tarragon into the red wine sauce. Remove the saucepan from the heat and cover to keep warm.

6. In a large sauté pan, heat the canola oil over high heat. When the oil is very hot, carefully fry a few potato wedges at a time until they turn brown on all sides, about 6 minutes. Transfer the frites as they are done to a plate lined with paper towels and sprinkle them lightly with the remaining 1 teaspoon salt.
7. Reheat the portobello caps in the oven if necessary. Serve smothered with red wine sauce and frites on the side.

potato-and-legume-meatballs-lezzet.name: Potato And Legume Meatballs
instructions: 1. Take the rondodan until potatoes, barley, börlce and buckwheat become the halfs of the buckwheat.
2. Reject onions.
3. Mix all materials in a deep mixing bowl and taste with spices.
4. Take walnut size parts from the mixture and roll it with your hands.
5. Cook in a non-stick surface pan or grill and serve hot.

potato-phyllo-pastry-recipe-lezzet.name: Potato Phyllo Pastry Recipe
instructions: 1. Roast potatoes with shells.
2. Peel the shells of the drug and Crush it with the help of a fork.
3. Heat the liquid oil in the pan.
4. Add the thin chopped onion and roast.
5. Add crushed potatoes to the car.
6. Salt, pepper, red pepper and mix with optional according to Kimyon.
7. 3–4 minutes after roasting, close the stove and leave the mortar cool.
8. Posted in Sauce by mixing milk, liquid oil and egg in a container.
9. One of the Yufka is cool on the countertop, with the help of thrown instead of.
10. Second Yufkayi pushes on the car and re----whole.
11. 11. evenly broadcast from the potato mortar.
12. Place or slice the coil and bö in the form of roll; insert or slice push with spiral (common) to the tray.
12. August The egg cheer, bump or smash.
14 July Cavique from 180°C to 35–40 minutes, look at to gold yellow.

powdered-sugar-icing.name: Powdered Sugar Icing
instructions:
Sift 1½ cups (150 grams) powdered sugar into a medium bowl to remove any lumps. Slowly whisk in 2 Tbsp. milk, lemon juice, or water and 2 tsp. vanilla extract (if using). Add more milk, lemon juice, or water, a little at a time, to make a smooth, pourable glaze. 

Editor’s note: This recipe was originally published in ‘Doughnuts’ by Lara Ferroni as Basic Sugar Glaze and first appeared on Epicurious in March 2013. Head this way for our favorite easy cookie recipes →

practical-tart-with-pasta-and-vegetables.name: Practical Tart With Pasta And Vegetables
instructions: 1. Bake pasta to the tooth and strain the water.
2. 1/3 cup of tea on the olive oil and mix and leave to cool.
3. Rinse pumpkin and caviar.
4. Add and mix 2 eggs, bake cheese, corn, sliced mushrooms, red powder pepper, thyme, salt and pepper.
5. Add and mix pasta.
6. Oil the oven container.
7. Transfer pasta from caliba and press thoroughly.
8. Preheated 180 degree cook until fried in the oven.
9. Add mozarella slices to remove from the oven and again bake.
10. Beat for 5 minutes and remove from the oven.
11. 11. Serve hot.

prepare-fish-with-vegetables-an-and-heal.name: Prepare Fish With Vegetables: An And Healthy Recipe
prepare-fish-with-vegetables-an-and-heal.original_name: Prepara pescaditos con verdura: una receta fácil y saludable
instructions: It starts by cutting green pepper, red pepper, pumpkin and onion into thin strips. That cut allows the vegetables to be cooked uniformly and better absorbed the flavors.
Corta los jureles en lomo, extrayendo todas las espinas. Si es posible, compra el pescado ya listo.

In a large frying pan, heat up sunflower oil with medium heat. Once hot, add cut and salted vegetables for about 5- 7 minutes, or till they are tender but still crispy. Add salt to your best while cooking them.

When the vegetables are ready, add the white wine to the frying pan. Let the wine be reduced by cooking for another 2-3 minutes till the alcohol and vegetables evaporate and become impregnated with its smell.

It purifies the oven at 180 and 3. Put the ham loins onto the vegetables in the frying pan and make sure they are well distributed. Transfer frying pan to the oven and baker for 5 minutes or until the fish is cooked but still juicy. The time may vary depending on the thickness of the loins.
Once ready, remove from the oven and serve the pastry loins onto the salted vegetables. Roand with some extra virgin olive oil to add a touch of freshness and additional flavour.

prepare-piloncillo-fritters-step-by-step.name: Prepare Piloncillo Fritters Step By Step
prepare-piloncillo-fritters-step-by-step.original_name: Prepara buñuelos de piloncillo paso a paso
instructions: Place the pyloncillo with ½ cup of water in a small and hot pot until dissolved into a light syrup.
Turn off and let cool till it's warm.
En un bol, incorpora la harina de trigo, sal y canela.
Agrega el huevo, la mantequilla y el jarabe de piloncillo. Integra hasta formar una masa suave.
Amasa for 10 minutes till the dough is elastic and slightly sticky.
Cover the dough with film paper or a clean cloth and let rest for 30 minutes.
Once resting, divide mass into small portions and give round, unequal or disc form to frits.
Warm oil at medium temperature - high in a frying pan.
Fry the discs for 30 to 40 seconds on each side, till they are golden and crispy.
Remove from the frying pan and place onto absorbing paper.
Sprinkle with refined sugar, glass or pyloncillo syrup.
Enjoy!

prepare-thai-noodles-with-vegetables-com.name: Prepare Thai Noodles With Vegetables

ingredients.item: 150 gr de fideos de arroz ( (integrales o regulares))
2 cda de siracha o alguna salsa picante
2 cda de salsa de soja oscura

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta preparando los fideos, de acuerdo a las indicaciones del empaque.
In a pot with enough water, cook them till they get to the dente. Listen to them, add a tablespoon of olive oil so they don't stick and reserve.
Now, you'll have the pimentons, the onion and the garlic tooth to cut them into small cubes.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and we'll add the vegetables. You have to cook them over medium heat for about 5 minutes.
Now we will start to put up with soya sauces, siracha, coconut milk, ginger fringes, lemon juice, fish sauce and a pint of salt. Mix and let cook for 3 minutes.
The fire goes up and it's time to add the noodles, and you're gonna mix them up till it's integrated with all the sauce. Jumps for about 5 minutes and goes out.
Serves hot and goes with more vegetables.
Enjoy!

pulled-pork-nachos.name: Pulled Pork Nachos
instructions: Place pork, onion, and seasonings into a 6-quart slow cooker. Mix to coat meat in seasonings.
Add ketchup and mustard, spreading evenly over the outside of the meat.
Set slow cooker to High and cook for 4 hours, until the meat pulls apart easily. Alternatively, the meat can be cooked on the Low setting for 8 hours.
Remove meat from slow cooker and transfer it to a bowl or cutting board. Using two forks, shred the meat into bite-sized pieces.
Preheat oven to 400˚F (200˚C).
Using a cast-iron pan or other oven-safe dish, assemble the nachos layer by layer. Chips, then pork, onion, BBQ sauce, and cheese. Repeat as desired for additional layers.
Bake for 8-10 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbling.
Top with sour cream, salsa, and cilantro.
Enjoy!

pumpkin-bread-pudding-with-spicy-caramel.name: Pumpkin Bread Pudding With Spicy Caramel Apple Sauce

ingredients.item: 1/2-inch cubed pumpkin bread or other bread

instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 163°C. Butter a 10-inch glass baking dish.
2. Spread the bread cubes on a large baking sheet and bake in the oven, turning once, until lightly toasted, about 15 minutes. Let cool.
3. Combine the cream, milk, and vanilla bean and seeds in a small saucepan over medium heat and bring to a simmer.
4. Whisk together the yolks, sugar, maple syrup, and pumpkin puree in a large bowl. Slowly whisk in the hot cream mixture until combined. Discard the vanilla bean and whisk in the bourbon.

5. Scatter the pumpkin bread cubes in the prepared baking dish. Pour the custard over the bread, pressing down on the bread to totally submerge it in the custard. Let sit for 15 minutes to allow the bread to soak up some of the custard.

6. Place the dish in a larger roasting pan and pour hot water into the roasting pan until it comes halfway up the sides of the glass dish. Bake until the sides are slightly puffed and the center jiggles slightly, about 1 hour. Remove from the oven and the water bath and cool on a wire rack for at least 30 minutes before serving.
7. Serve the warm bread pudding topped with whipped cream and drizzled with spicy caramel apple sauce . Sprinkle with pumpkin seeds if desired.

pumpkin-cream-in-mycook-pequerecetas.name: Pumpkin Cream In Mycook
instructions: Pelamos la cebolla y el diente de ajo. Cortamos la cebolla en juliana y el ajo por la mitad.  Lavamos bien la calabaza, la partimos por la mitad y con una cuchara le quitamos las hebras y semillas. Seguidamente cortamos en rodajas y luego en cubos.

We add 40 ml of extra virgin olive oil to Mycook's pitcher and program for 1 minute with a 120 ° sodith function. Then we add the garlic tooth cut into two and program 1 minute with a frying function at 120 °. Finally we add the onion cut in half and program again as sodith 2 minutes at 120 °, all with an anti-splinter cover put.
We add pumpkin cut into cubes and program 1 minute at speed 5 to cut pumpkin into smaller pieces.
We then add the vegetable stock and program 120 ° at Speed 2 for 20 minutes until pumpkin has been soft.
Once after 20 minutes we add cream, salt and pepper and program Turbo 3 times or until pumpkin cream reaches the texture we wish.
Once I have the desired texture, we serve and decorate to suit, for example with a cream chorrit, roasted pumpkin seeds or aromatic herbs.

pumpkin-fluff.name: Pumpkin Fluff
instructions: Mix pumpkin puree, whipped topping, pudding mix, sugar, pumpkin pie spice, and vanilla together until blended.

pumpkin-pie-wheat-free-egg-free-and-dair.name: Pumpkin Pie (wheat-free, Egg-free, And Dairy-free)
instructions: Preheat an oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Stir together all purpose gluten-free flour and 1 teaspoon salt. In a separate bowl, whisk together the vegetable oil and soy creamer until creamy. Pour oil mixture into flour mixture, stir with fork until blended. Pat the crust into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan. Bake for 15 minutes in preheated oven. Remove and set aside.

Decrease oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Place pumpkin, soy creamer, brown sugar, cornstarch, corn syrup, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, salt, and cloves in a blender. Blend until combined. Pour into prebaked pie crust. Place foil around the edges of the pie crust and bake for 60 minutes or until a knife inserted 1 inch from crust comes out clean. Cool pie on counter for 2 hours then refrigerate overnight before serving.

pumpkin-sufganiot-with-cranberry-jelly.name: Pumpkin Sufganiot With Cranberry Jelly
instructions: Place butter in the mixing bowl of a stand mixer. Pour hot milk over butter; stir occasionally until butter melts. Whisk pumpkin puree, 3/4 cup white sugar, eggs, and egg yolk into milk mixture.

In separate bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, ginger, cinnamon, and allspice. Using the paddle attachment, mix in about 4 cups of flour mixture on low speed. Scrape down sides of bowl and underneath paddle. Add remaining flour and mix, scraping down sides, on low speed until fully combined. Dough will be very wet, almost cookie-dough consistency; don't worry, it will absorb moisture as it sits.
Transfer dough to a greased bowl. Cover bowl with plastic wrap lightly coated with cooking spray. Refrigerate for at least 5 hours or overnight.

Combine canned cranberry sauce with 1/3 cup water in a small saucepan. Break the sauce up slightly with a spoon. Heat, covered, over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until cranberry sauce melts, about 25 minutes. Pour into a bowl and refrigerate.

Place chilled dough on well-floured work surface. Shape it into a ball, divide the dough in half, and return half the dough to the greased bowl. Cover with greased plastic wrap and refrigerate. Roll out remaining dough half, flouring surface as needed, to 1/4-inch thickness. Cut out dough rounds with a 3-inch cutter.
Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone liner. This will prevent the dough from sticking and tearing.

Transfer dough rounds to prepared baking sheet in pairs (one will be the top half, the other the bottom half of the doughnut). Gather up remaining dough scraps and add them to the dough stored in the refrigerator.
Whisk egg white with 1 teaspoon water. Brush the rounds that will be the bottom halves of the doughnuts with the beaten egg white.
Spoon 1 teaspoon cranberry jelly into center of each bottom round; arrange second round on top and press edges to seal. Let doughnuts rest 20 minutes.

Working in batches, fry doughnuts until well browned, about 1 1/2 minutes per side. Drain doughnuts on paper towels. Pour 1/2 cup white sugar into a bag or large bowl; toss doughnuts in sugar to coat. Dust doughnuts with confectioners' sugar before serving. Repeat with remaining dough.
